## Parent
Reference: PORTFOLIO_V2_PRD.md

## What to build
Initialize React + Vite + TypeScript project with integrated Vanta.js WAVES ocean background. Create a basic HTML page that displays the ocean wave animation with mouse interaction on a dark background.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Vite + React + TypeScript project initialized with `npm create vite@latest`
- [ ] Vanta.js dependency installed: `npm install vanta`
- [ ] Three.js peer dependency installed (required by Vanta.js)
- [ ] Basic `App.tsx` component with Vanta.js WAVES effect configured
- [ ] Ocean wave animation visible on page load with mouse repulsion effect
- [ ] Dark background color (#1d1e2b) applied
- [ ] Build succeeds without TypeScript errors
- [ ] Dev server runs locally at `localhost:5173`

## Blocked by
None - can start immediately
